note: cold spec-judge first pass ALIGNED:false — three fixes: a Then named an internal reuse path (reworded to observable-only), --no-nudge covered peer only (added Bunker opt-out scenario), root spec.md Capabilities mail-row stale (added doorbell). Fresh cold spec-judge second pass ALIGNED:true, all three verified landed.

cold impl-judge first pass IMPLEMENTATION_PASS:false — mutation-confirmed the two --no-nudge scenarios named a CLI invocation but only wakeRecipient({noNudge}) was tested, so the flag→behavior line was unguarded. Fix: added 2 mutation-resistant CLI-flag e2e tests. Also fixed a latent correctness bug found in review — selectSessionAdapter was evaluated eagerly per send and throws with no mux backend, which would fail a send from a non-mux session even to a headless recipient (violates never-fails-the-send); made adapter selection lazy inside wakeRecipient's swallowing try. Self-verified mutation resistance; re-judging.
